new_javadoc:
/** * Fills and returns the given array, assigning {@code '\0'} to each element of the array. *

* Equivalent to: *

* 
     * ArrayFill.fill(a, '\0'); // and not '0'!
     *
* * @param a the array to fill (may be null). * @return the given array. * @see Arrays#fill(char[],char) * @see ArrayFill#fill(char[],char) * @see CharUtils#NUL * @since 3.21.0 */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/ArrayFill.java @@ -0,0 +29,22 @@ + */ +public final class ArrayFill { + + /** + * Fills and returns the given array, assigning {@code '\0'} to each element of the array. + *

+ * Equivalent to: + *

+ * 
+     * ArrayFill.fill(a, '\0'); // and not '0'!
+     *
+ * + * @param a the array to fill (may be null). + * @return the given array. + * @see Arrays#fill(char[],char) + * @see ArrayFill#fill(char[],char) + * @see CharUtils#NUL + * @since 3.21.0 + */ + public static char[] clear(final char[] a) { + return fill(a, CharUtils.NUL); // and not '0'! + }
